prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app UI badge pair for language-learning listen page track labels
Primary request: Create TWO small rounded pill badges side by side, matching the app icon color scheme for 词句刷刷刷 — bright azure blue for words, vibrant tangerine orange for sentences.
Style/medium: polished 3D translucent jelly glass mobile-game UI, glossy highlights, subtle inner bubbles and water droplets, soft white rim glow like app icon tiles

LEFT BADGE (word label):
- Horizontal rounded pill capsule in bright azure blue (#00AEEF), translucent jelly glass
- Single Chinese character "词" centered in bold white, clean sans-serif, highly legible at small size

RIGHT BADGE (sentence label):
- Horizontal rounded pill capsule in vibrant tangerine orange (#FF8C00), translucent jelly glass
- Single Chinese character "句" centered in bold white, clean sans-serif, highly legible at small size

Both badges matching siblings: equal height, similar width, clear gap between them. No icons besides Chinese characters. No English text.
Composition/framing: both badges centered vertically, generous padding, front-facing, crisp edges for small UI use
Lighting/mood: bright cheerful studio lighting, soft specular highlights
Constraints: no logos, no watermark
Avoid: cast shadow, contact shadow, floor, reflections outside badges
Background: perfectly flat solid magenta #ff00ff chroma-key only. Uniform with no gradients or texture. Do not use magenta in the badges.
